snippets.title: OSI Layer Simulation
snippets.python:
class OSIModel:
    """Simulation of OSI model encapsulation"""
    
    LAYERS = [
        ('Application', 'Data'),
        ('Presentation', 'Data'),
        ('Session', 'Data'),
        ('Transport', 'Segment'),
        ('Network', 'Packet'),
        ('Data Link', 'Frame'),
        ('Physical', 'Bits')
    ]
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.data = None
    
    def send(self, message):
        """Encapsulate data going down the layers"""
        print(f"\n=== Sending: '{message}' ===")
        print("Encapsulation (sender side):")
        
        current_data = message
        
        for i, (layer, pdu) in enumerate(self.LAYERS):
            if i < 3:  # Upper layers - just data
                print(f"  Layer {7-i} ({layer}): {pdu} = '{current_data}'")
            elif layer == 'Transport':
                current_data = f"[TCP:{current_data}]"
                print(f"  Layer 4 ({layer}): {pdu} = {current_data}")
            elif layer == 'Network':
                current_data = f"[IP:{current_data}]"
                print(f"  Layer 3 ({layer}): {pdu} = {current_data}")
            elif layer == 'Data Link':
                current_data = f"[MAC:{current_data}:CRC]"
                print(f"  Layer 2 ({layer}): {pdu} = {current_data}")
            else:
                current_data = f"101010...{len(current_data)} bits...010101"
                print(f"  Layer 1 ({layer}): {pdu} = {current_data}")
        
        return current_data
    
    def receive(self, bits):
        """Decapsulate data going up the layers"""
        print("\nDecapsulation (receiver side):")
        
        # Simulate removing headers
        headers = ['Bits', 'MAC/CRC', 'IP', 'TCP']
        data = bits
        
        for i, header in enumerate(headers):
            print(f"  Remove {header} header...")
        
        print("  Upper layers process data")
        print("  Application receives: original message")

# Demo
osi = OSIModel()
osi.send("Hello, Network!")
osi.receive("bits")

# Layer info
print("\n=== OSI Layers Reference ===")
print("Layer | Name         | PDU     | Protocols")
print("-" * 50)
info = [
    (7, 'Application', 'Data', 'HTTP, FTP, DNS'),
    (6, 'Presentation', 'Data', 'SSL, JPEG, ASCII'),
    (5, 'Session', 'Data', 'NetBIOS, RPC'),
    (4, 'Transport', 'Segment', 'TCP, UDP'),
    (3, 'Network', 'Packet', 'IP, ICMP, OSPF'),
    (2, 'Data Link', 'Frame', 'Ethernet, MAC'),
    (1, 'Physical', 'Bits', 'Cables, Signals')
]
for layer, name, pdu, protocols in info:
    print(f"  {layer}   | {name:12} | {pdu:7} | {protocols}")
